title: Writing a System Monitor in Pure x86_64 Assembly
excerpt: No libc. No C runtime. Just NASM, raw syscalls, and /proc. A deep dive into how Assembly-Sysmon reads CPU, memory, load, and network data and calculates a threat score entirely in hand-rolled machine code.

title: Building a ctOS-Themed Portfolio with Pure HTML/CSS/JS
excerpt: How I built a literal terminal interface inspired by Watch_Dogs, with a lock-screen, two ASCII mini-games, sound effects, a client-side Markdown blog, and zero build tools.

title: Porting Verlet Rope Physics to a Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric Mod
excerpt: Swing mechanics, UV mapping an 8x16 rope texture, fixing mixin callback types, and debugging lightmap coordinates — notes from building the rope system for the Sync mod.
